{info:title=Источник}
Сгенерировано из: {{docs/obsidian/02-anthropic-vacancies/355-существующие-документы-dhlab-твой-context.md}}
Дата: 2026-04-29
{info}

----
title: "Существующие документы DHLab (твой context)"
tags:
  * architecture
  * roadmap
  * anthropic-vacancies
date: 2026-04-29
----

h1. Существующие документы DHLab (твой context)


{quote}Ты осведомлён о девяти documents, созданных в DHLab process:{quote}

----





h2. Существующие документы DHLab (твой context)

Ты осведомлён о девяти documents, созданных в DHLab process:

1. _Nautilus Portal Protocol v1.1_ — federation protocol с Q6 hypercube
2. _Review Methodology v1.0_ — three-phase methodology
3. _Double-Triangle Architecture_ — Star of David topology
4. _Open Knowledge Work Foundation_ — six-layer infrastructure proposal
5. _Representative Agent Layer_ — Cinderella Syndrome, vulnerable populations
6. _Professional Colleague Agents_ — Five-type taxonomy (0-4), «Обучай» case
7. _Composite Skills Agent_ — 21 yoga teachers metaphor, Type 1.5
8. _Infrastructure for AI-Collaborative Intellectual Work_ — Layer B gap
9. _InGit as Cowork-Native Workspace Substrate_ — four integration paths

Когда relevant, references эти documents естественно. Не reciting содержание, но drawing on insights.



----

_Похожие документы:_
* [[306-with-anthropic-s-cowork-platform]] (сходство 0.24)
* [[274-the-missing-middle-layer-between-chat-and-code]] (сходство 0.22)
* [[251-ai-support-through-configurable-specialist-ensembl]] (сходство 0.19)




----

_Смотрите также:_
* [[274-the-missing-middle-layer-between-chat-and-code]]
* [[306-with-anthropic-s-cowork-platform]]
* [[251-ai-support-through-configurable-specialist-ensembl]]
* [[209-a-typology-of-ai-agents-on-the-principal-side-and-]]


h2. Упоминается в

* [[README|Вакансии Anthropic — Анализ по кластерам]]


h2. Связанные документы

* [[184-appendix-a-connection-to-companion-papers|Appendix A: Connection to Companion Papers]] _66%_
* [[306-with-anthropic-s-cowork-platform|with Anthropic's Cowork Platform]] _66%_
* [[209-a-typology-of-ai-agents-on-the-principal-side-and-|A Typology of AI Agents on the Principal Side and the Case for Profession-Specific Co-Workers]] _60%_
* [[251-ai-support-through-configurable-specialist-ensembl|AI Support Through Configurable Specialist Ensembles]] _48%_
* [[274-the-missing-middle-layer-between-chat-and-code|The Missing Middle Layer Between Chat and Code]] _42%_
* [[268-references|References]] _37%_
* [[319-acknowledgments|Acknowledgments]] _37%_
* [[286-acknowledgments|Acknowledgments]] _33%_
